name: control-plane-flow
description: The power of Kubernetes with the ease of Heroku! Simple CI configuration for Heroku-style "review apps," staging deployments, and promoting staging to production, following the "convention over configuration" philosophy.
description_ja: KubernetesのパワーとHerokuの手軽さを両立。「設定より規約」の哲学に従い、Heroku風「レビューアプリ」・ステージングデプロイ・本番昇格をシンプルなCI設定で実現。
